title: IT PMO Specialist (APAC Programs & Governance) _Contract
description:
Job Title

IT PMO Specialist (APAC Programs & Governance)

Employment Type

Contract (6 months, renewable)

Hiring Company

NTT DATA

Work Location

Singapore – Buona Vista


Experience Required

Minimum 3+ years of experience in IT PMO / Project Governance / Portfolio Management

Role Overview

We are seeking a detail-oriented IT PMO Specialist to support regional IT programs and portfolio governance across the APAC region. Reporting to the IT PMO Manager, this role plays a key part in strengthening project delivery discipline, governance controls, and executive reporting.

The incumbent will work closely with IT project managers, delivery teams, and senior stakeholders to ensure structured execution, transparency, and alignment with business objectives across multiple programs and initiatives.

This role is ideal for candidates with strong exposure to PMO governance, portfolio reporting, steering committee support, and IT project controls in a regional or enterprise environment.

Key Responsibilities

PMO Governance & Portfolio Control

  • Define, implement, and continuously enhance PMO frameworks, standards, and controls

  • Ensure compliance with governance models, stage-gate reviews, and approval processes

  • Act as a central governance point for program and portfolio oversight

  • Monitor schedules, budgets, scope, risks, issues, and dependencies at program level

  • Enforce consistent change control, risk management, and escalation practices

  • Provide portfolio transparency and reporting alignment with global IT PMO teams

Project Management Standards & Best Practices

  • Develop and maintain project management templates, guidelines, and toolkits

  • Coach project managers and delivery teams on governance standards and best practices

  • Drive continuous improvement initiatives to uplift project delivery maturity

  • Ensure audit readiness and compliance with documentation standards

  • Support delivery assurance to meet scope, timeline, and business value objectives

Executive Reporting & Stakeholder Management

  • Own consolidated program and portfolio dashboards and reports

  • Prepare high-quality materials for Steering Committees, Management, and Executive forums

  • Highlight key risks, trade-offs, and decision points with clear recommendations

  • Support APAC IT demand intake and validation processes

  • Review and validate business cases, project scopes, estimates, and value propositions

  • Coordinate cross-functional dependencies across IT, business units, and vendors

  • Track vendor delivery performance against milestones and contractual commitments



    Interested candidates are kindly requested to email their CV with their experience to sandeep.sringeripai@global.ntt

    We look forward to your application!

postedCompany.description:
NTT Singapore Pte Ltd (NTTS) is the regional headquarters of NTT Communications Corporation (NTT Com) for Asia Pacific Region.

Established in 1997, NTT Singapore has more than 10 years of expertise in providing information and communications technology (ICT) solutions worldwide.

NTT Singapore offers diverse high-quality connectivity, data centre solutions, security services, IT management services, voice and conferencing solutions and solution integration services to its enterprise customers.

NTT Communications is a wholly owned subsidiary of Nippon Telegraph and Telephone Corporation (NTT Corp.), one of the world’s largest providers of telecommunications services.

 In 2013, NTT Corp. is ranked no.1 in telecom industry in the Fortune Global 500* list with operating revenues of more than $133,077 million. It is positioned 32nd among the top 500 corporations worldwide.

 NTT Com's extensive global infrastructure includes Arcstar secure private networks, which cover 196 countries/regions and a tier-1 IP backbone network connected with major ISPs worldwide, as well as secure data centers at over 150 locations worldwide.
postedCompany.name: NTT SINGAPORE PTE. LTD.
